name: Christmas Morning Wife Saver
recipeIngredient: 16 slices of back bacon or ham, cooked
Cornflakes or Special K cereal, crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a 9 x 13-inch buttered baking dish, arrange 8 slices of bread in the bottom.
3. Cover the bread with cooked back bacon or ham slices.
4. Lay slices of cheddar cheese on top, then cover with additional slices of bread to create sandwiches.
5. In a bowl, beat eggs and combine with salt and pepper. Add dry mustard, onion, green pepper, Worcestershire sauce, milk, and Tabasco. Stir until well mixed.
6. Pour the egg mixture over the sandwiches.
7. Cover and let stand in the refrigerator overnight.
8. Preheat oven to 350°F in the morning.
9. Melt 1/4 pound butter and pour evenly over the top of the sandwiches.
10. Sprinkle crushed cornflakes or Special K cereal on top.
11. Bake for 1 hour at 350°F.
12. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
